comment: Type config for the Playwright + Chromium portal e2e. These specs run page.evaluate() callbacks in a real browser (so they need the DOM lib) and use Playwright's bundler module resolution (extensionless relative imports of ./support/*). The repo's tsconfig.check.json uses NodeNext + ES2022-only libs for the shipped CLI and intentionally excludes this tree; `npm run typecheck:e2e` type-checks it against this config instead. Playwright's own runner transpiles via esbuild (types stripped), so this config is what gives the specs a real type bar.
